title: News Corp shareholder T Rowe Price raises concerns about merger with Fox - NYT
text: T. Rowe Price , a major shareholder in News Corp , said it had strong reservations about Rupert Murdoch's plan to reunite News Corp and Fox Corp , The New York Times reported on Friday, making it the third investor to express dissent over the plan.

title: Potential News Corp, Fox reunion faces opposition from large shareholder
text: One of the largest shareholders in both News Corp and Fox is opposing a recombination of the companies.

title: News Corp.-Fox Merger Said To Face Opposition From Key Shareholder In Both Companies
text: A London-based investor in Rupert Murdoch's News Corp. and Fox Corp. has reportedly expressed its opposition to the companies' potential reunification. Independent Franchise Partners is one of the largest shareholders apart from the Murdoch family, with stakes in Fox and News Corp. of more than 7%.

title: Fox News-News Corp planned merger has opposition from major shareholder
text: A major outside shareholder in News Corp NWSA, +2.00% NWS, +2.31% and Fox Corp. FOXA, +1.28% FOX, +0.97% opposes a plan by Rupert Murdoch to recombine the companies and wants other alternatives considered, including a breakup of News Corp.

title: 3 Stocks That Could Get a ‘Trump Bump' on the Way to the 2024 Election
text: Former President Donald Trump has officially filed for a third run at the White House in a move that will fire up his base. Trump made the announcement Tuesday night, saying he wants to give Republicans a fighting chance in the next election.

title: 7 Nasdaq Stocks Set to Soar From 52-Week Lows
text: Nasdaq stocks have been some of the hardest hit during the market downturn. In fact, over the last 12 months, the Nasdaq Composite Index has dropped more than 35%.

title: Fox Corporation (FOX) Q1 2023 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Fox Corporation (NASDAQ:FOX ) Q1 2023 Earnings Conference Call November 1, 2022 8:30 AM ET Company Representatives Lachlan Murdoch - Executive Chair, Chief Executive Officer John Nallen - Chief Operating Officer Steve Tomsic - Chief Financial Officer Gabrielle Brown - Chief Investor Relations Officer Conference Call Participants Jessica Reif Ehrlich - Bank of America Securities Robert Fishman - MoffettNathanson Ben Swinburne - Morgan Stanley Phil Cusick - JPMorgan Steven Cahall - Wells Fargo John Hodulik - UBS Operator Ladies and gentlemen, thank you for standing by. title: Fox earnings lifted by advertising revenue from free streaming service Tubi
text: Fox said Tuesday its free streaming service Tubi helped boost its advertising revenue.
